egg: noun. An approximately spherical or ellipsoidal body produced by birds, insects, reptiles, and other animals, often housing an embryo

rust: noun. The deteriorated state of iron or steel as a result of moisture and oxidation; it consists mostly of iron(III) oxide (ferric oxide)

sure: adjective. Physically secure and certain, non-failing, reliable.
